ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "origin_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin airport */,
  "dest_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination airport */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Actual flight number */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot in charge */,
  "actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual time of departure */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of departure */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_dest_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("dest_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Total number of aircraft in the fleet */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight affected by the delay */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., departure delay, arrival delay) */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the delay (e.g., weather, air traffic control) */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay started */,
  "delay_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay ended */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to recover from the delay in minutes */,
  "compensation_provided" INTEGER /* Whether compensation was provided to passengers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the weather data was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_control" (
  "atc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ATC record */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the ATC data was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the ATC record */,
  "atc_status" TEXT /* Status of the ATC (e.g., operational, non-operational) */,
  "atc_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the ATC status was recorded */,
  "atc_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the ATC status changed */,
  "atc_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ATC status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_control_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Scheduled departure date */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival date */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of the week the flight operates */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the origin and destination airports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_encoded_Month" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "mean_encoded_value" REAL /* Mean encoded value for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_encoded_DayofMonth" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day */,
  "mean_encoded_value" REAL /* Mean encoded value for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_encoded_DayOfWeek" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day */,
  "mean_encoded_value" REAL /* Mean encoded value for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_encoded_Origin" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  "mean_encoded_value" REAL /* Mean encoded value for the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_encoded_Dest" (
  "dest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "dest_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination */,
  "mean_encoded_value" REAL /* Mean encoded value for the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
